title: Feature request for Workload Dashboard
excerpt: In the Workload dashboard, we would like to be able to reorder the people. Not being able to do so is a big headache for us. We have specific roles on our team, and we’d like to put people in similar roles next to each o…

posts.author: Donald (Donald Cowper)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Workload dashboard, we would like to be able to reorder the people. Not being able to do so is a big headache for us. We have specific roles on our team, and we’d like to put people in similar roles next to each other - this would let us easily compare the capacity, and reassign tasks according to who is available. Currently, I have to scroll up and down to see the capacity of similar roles - without being able to visually see those roles side-by-side it’s hard to make a comparison. This problem is getting worse and worse as our team grows. We have contacted support and understand that there are no workarounds for this.
